symptom_vector: Pod crash, pod terminated unexpectedly, container exit, pod failure

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [shippingservice-1] experienced [client_error_ratio, error_ratio] fault, accompanied by [client_error, error, error_ratiopod_processes, request, response] anomalies.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [shippingservice-1] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [client_error_ratio] in Metric data with value 31.66 (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [error_ratio] in Metric data with value 31.66 (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [client_error_ratio, error_ratio] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: shippingservice-1's client_error_ratio spiked to 31.66 with p99 change rate 2.0 in anomaly metrics table
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [client_error_ratio] with pod_name=shippingservice-1 in metric anomaly data

critical_checks.expected_pattern: shippingservice-1's error_ratio spiked to 31.66 with p99 change rate 2.0 in anomaly metrics table
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [error_ratio] with pod_name=shippingservice-1 in metric anomaly data
